Tools and Canvases

Working tools for structural transformation.

Every canvas, diagnostic, and framework in the ecosystem, organized by the four stages of the Stop Being The System Architecture. Use them to map where the system still lives in you, where authority needs to be placed, which growth path you are building toward, and how to design the revenue pathway that works without you.

These canvases are the working tools behind the Mastermind. Each one is the result of two decades of diagnostic work with founders who had outgrown their own businesses. They are shared here so you can see the frameworks before you decide to work with them.

View only. Canvases are available for members of the Mastermind.
Stop Being The System

SBTS Architecture Map

The complete visual map of the Stop Being The System framework, from Founder Dependency Pattern through Business Architecture Shift to full Founder Liberation.

Stop Being The System

Founder Dependency Canvas

Diagnose exactly where founder dependency lives in your business. Map the five dependency zones and identify your highest risk exposure points before they cost you growth.

Stop Being The System

Authority Placement Canvas

Map where authority currently lives in your organization versus where it must live for sustainable growth. The Permission Bottleneck is visible here before you feel it in revenue.

Stop Being The System

Growth Path Decision Canvas

The strategic decision framework for founders navigating the Growth Path Decision, choosing between service, subscription, product, ecosystem, licensing, or media models as a scale pathway.

50 Shades of Paid

Growth Pathway Canvas

A companion to the Growth Path Decision Canvas. Design the opportunity, build the pathway, and commit to your first structural move toward a business that works without you.

50 Shades of Paid

Revenue Pathway Canvas

The five revenue lanes every founder must build. Serve, Package, Subscribe, Systemize, Expand. Choose the lane, design the system, stop being the ceiling.

50 Shades of Paid

Revenue Design Canvas

Use this canvas before designing offers. Diagnose the bottleneck before you optimize. Covers market, position, proof of value, delivery, and conversion in one view.

Diagnostic

Service Business Stress Test

A diagnostic canvas that reveals whether your service business can survive without you, and which of the five founder failure archetypes is silently capping your growth.

Diagnostic

Product Business Stress Test

The diagnostic built specifically for product based founders, uncovering inventory dependency, distribution bottlenecks, and the revenue pathways you are not monetizing.

Work the Canvases With Me

Apply the frameworks with the founder who built them.

The canvases on this page are the working documents of the Mastermind. Inside, you will not just view them. You will complete them with direct strategic input on your business, your revenue architecture, and your pathway to a company that runs without you.

Join the Mastermind
